summary: DemoAI Multi-Product Showcase Hub frontend testing complete. All requested features working correctly. Terminal overlay animation with typewriter effect, protocol card navigation, waitlist modal for staging protocols, sidebar toggle, and back navigation all verified.

issues: Console warnings about HTML structure (tr/span/tbody nesting) - minor React hydration warning, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Terminal animation typewriter effect takes 6-10 seconds to complete (longer than expected 2-3 seconds mentioned in specs, but works correctly)
WaitlistModal correctly shows for staging/placeholder protocols after terminal animation
Route configuration working: /showcase shows DemoShowcaseHub, /amazon-audit shows DemoUniversePage, /monetization shows MonetizationPage
context_for_next_testing_agent: DemoAI Showcase Hub is fully functional. Terminal animation takes longer than documented but works. All protocol card interactions tested.

- Button visible in header, navigates back to '/' (root)

- AI Command Center heading visible
- Marketplace tabs (Amazon, Walmart, Target, Quick-Commerce) visible
- Data toggles (Total, Organic, Paid) visible

- KPI cards, charts, and Top Products table all rendered

design_review.overall: Industrial Luxury Tech aesthetic implemented correctly
positives: Deep black (#000000) canvas with subtle radial gradient ambient lights
Glassmorphism cards with proper border and backdrop-blur effects
Magnetic hover effect with cyan glow working on protocol cards
Terminal overlay has scanline effect and CRT flicker animation
Status badges properly colored (emerald for ACTIVE, cyan for PREVIEW, purple for STAGING, amber for COMING SOON)
notes: Bento grid layout displays 6 protocol cards in responsive grid
System Status indicator has animated pulse effect on green dot
